body.outputs: SharedRecord — versioned record with full transition/audit history.
body.failure_behaviour: 404 if record_id unknown; 409 on duplicate register; 400 on missing required payload fields or mutation of a deprecated record. Never fabricates or silently drops a record.
body.ownership_boundary: MASTERDB stores/versions credential *references* only — not an identity provider. No password hashing, no token issuance, no auth decisioning.
